docs.title: zig-crypto
docs.text:
Portable cryptographic primitives in Zig -- SHA-256, HMAC, AES-CBC, ECDH P-256, Ed25519, PBKDF2, and CSPRNG with a C FFI.

License: Zlib OR MIT

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• SHA-256: Hash and hex-string output
  • HMAC-SHA-256: Keyed message authentication
  • AES-128/256-CBC: Encrypt/decrypt with PKCS#7 padding and raw (no-padding) variants
  • PBKDF2-SHA1: Key derivation
  • ECDH P-256: Ephemeral key generation and shared secret derivation
  • Ed25519: Key generation, signing, and verification
  • CSPRNG: Cryptographically secure random bytes
  • C FFI: All primitives exported for Swift, C, C++ interop

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
# Build static library
zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast

# Run tests
zig build test
zig build test-pbt

docs.title: Architecture
docs.text:
graph TD
    A[Application] -->|C FFI| B[ffi.zig]
    B --> C[sha256.zig]

    B --> E[aes.zig]
    B --> F[pbkdf2.zig]

docs.title: Source Tree
docs.text:
zig-crypto/
  build.zig           -- Build configuration
  include/
    zig_crypto.h       -- C header (public API)
  src/
    ffi.zig            -- C FFI exports
    sha256.zig         -- SHA-256 hash
    hmac.zig           -- HMAC-SHA-256
    aes.zig            -- AES-128/256-CBC
    pbkdf2.zig         -- PBKDF2-SHA1

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
• Zig 0.15.2+
  • macOS or Linux

docs.title: AGENTS.md
docs.text: Instructions for AI agents working with this codebase.

docs.title: Project
docs.text: zig-crypto provides portable cryptographic primitives in Zig with a C FFI. Used by zig-ctap2 for FIDO2 PIN protocol v2.

docs.title: Build
docs.text:
zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast    # static library
zig build test                       # unit tests
zig build test-pbt                   # property-based tests

docs.title: Structure
docs.text:
• include/zig_crypto.h -- Public C API header
  • src/ffi.zig -- C FFI export layer
  • src/sha256.zig -- SHA-256 hash
  • src/hmac.zig -- HMAC-SHA-256
  • src/aes.zig -- AES-128/256-CBC (PKCS#7 and raw variants)
  • src/pbkdf2.zig -- PBKDF2-SHA1 key derivation
  • src/ecdh.zig -- ECDH P-256 key agreement
  • src/ed25519.zig -- Ed25519 signatures
  • src/random.zig -- CSPRNG wrapper

docs.title: Conventions
docs.text:
• C exports use snake_case with zig_crypto_ prefix
  • Zig internals use camelCase
  • All crypto is pure Zig (Zig stdlib), no platform deps except CSPRNG
  • Return values: 0 = success, -1 = failure (for functions returning c_int)
  • Output is written to caller-provided buffers with documented minimum sizes

docs.title: zig_crypto.h
docs.text: Function Description zig_crypto_sha256 Compute SHA-256 hash. out must be at least 32 bytes. zig_crypto_sha256_hex Compute SHA-256 and write lowercase hex string. out must be at least 64 bytes. Returns number of hex chars written (always 64). zig_crypto_hmac_sha256 Compute HMAC-SHA-256. out must be at least 32 bytes. zig_crypto_aes128_cbc_encrypt AES-128-CBC encrypt (PKCS#7 padding). Returns ciphertext length or -1. zig_crypto_aes128_cbc_decrypt AES-128-CBC decrypt (PKCS#7 unpadding). Returns plaintext length or -1. zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_encrypt AES-256-CBC encrypt (PKCS#7 padding). Returns ciphertext length or -1. zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_decrypt AES-256-CBC decrypt (PKCS#7 unpadding). Returns plaintext length or -1. zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_encrypt_raw AES-256-CBC encrypt without padding (raw blocks). plaintext_len must be a multiple of 16. For CTAP2 PIN protocol. zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_decrypt_raw AES-256-CBC decrypt without unpadding (raw blocks). ciphertext_len must be a multiple of 16. For CTAP2 PIN protocol. zig_crypto_pbkdf2_sha1 PBKDF2 with HMAC-SHA1. Derives out_len bytes of key material. zig_crypto_p256_generate Generate ephemeral P-256 key pair. Writes 32 bytes each to out_scalar, out_pub_x, out_pub_y. Returns 0 on success, -1 on failure. zig_crypto_p256_ecdh ECDH shared secret: SHA-256(x-coordinate of scalar * peer_point). Writes 32 bytes to out_shared_secret. Returns 0 on success, -1 on failure. zig_crypto_ed25519_generate Generate random Ed25519 key pair. Writes seed(32), public(32), signing_key(64). zig_crypto_ed25519_from_seed Derive Ed25519 key pair from 32-byte seed (deterministic). Writes public(32), signing_key(64). Returns 0 on success, -1 on failure. zig_crypto_ed25519_sign Sign a message with Ed25519. Writes 64-byte signature. Returns 0 on success, -1 on failure. zig_crypto_ed25519_verify Verify an Ed25519 signature. Returns true if valid. zig_crypto_random Fill buffer with cryptographically secure random bytes. Returns true on success, false on failure.

docs.title: zig_crypto_sha256
docs.text:
Compute SHA-256 hash. out must be at least 32 bytes.

void zig_crypto_sha256(const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len, uint8_t *out);

docs.title: zig_crypto_sha256_hex
docs.text:
Compute SHA-256 and write lowercase hex string. out must be at least 64 bytes. Returns number of hex chars written (always 64).

size_t zig_crypto_sha256_hex(const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len, uint8_t *out);

docs.title: zig_crypto_hmac_sha256
docs.text:
Compute HMAC-SHA-256. out must be at least 32 bytes.

void zig_crypto_hmac_sha256( const uint8_t *key, size_t key_len, const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len, uint8_t *out );

docs.title: zig_crypto_aes128_cbc_encrypt
docs.text:
AES-128-CBC encrypt (PKCS#7 padding). Returns ciphertext length or -1.

int zig_crypto_aes128_cbc_encrypt( const uint8_t key[16], const uint8_t iv[16], const uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_len, uint8_t *out );

docs.title: zig_crypto_aes128_cbc_decrypt
docs.text:
AES-128-CBC decrypt (PKCS#7 unpadding). Returns plaintext length or -1.

int zig_crypto_aes128_cbc_decrypt( const uint8_t key[16], const uint8_t iv[16], const uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_len, uint8_t *out );

docs.title: zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_encrypt
docs.text:
AES-256-CBC encrypt (PKCS#7 padding). Returns ciphertext length or -1.

int zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_encrypt( const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t iv[16], const uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_len, uint8_t *out );

docs.title: zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_decrypt
docs.text:
AES-256-CBC decrypt (PKCS#7 unpadding). Returns plaintext length or -1.

int zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_decrypt( const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t iv[16], const uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_len, uint8_t *out );

docs.title: zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_encrypt_raw
docs.text:
AES-256-CBC encrypt without padding (raw blocks). plaintext_len must be a multiple of 16. For CTAP2 PIN protocol.

int zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_encrypt_raw( const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t iv[16], const uint8_t *plaintext, size_t plaintext_len, uint8_t *out );

docs.title: zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_decrypt_raw
docs.text:
AES-256-CBC decrypt without unpadding (raw blocks). ciphertext_len must be a multiple of 16. For CTAP2 PIN protocol.

int zig_crypto_aes256_cbc_decrypt_raw( const uint8_t key[32], const uint8_t iv[16], const uint8_t *ciphertext, size_t ciphertext_len, uint8_t *out );

docs.title: zig_crypto_pbkdf2_sha1
docs.text:
PBKDF2 with HMAC-SHA1. Derives out_len bytes of key material.

void zig_crypto_pbkdf2_sha1( const uint8_t *passphrase, size_t passphrase_len, const uint8_t *salt, size_t salt_len, uint32_t iterations, uint8_t *out, size_t out_len );

docs.title: zig_crypto_p256_generate
docs.text:
Generate ephemeral P-256 key pair. Writes 32 bytes each to out_scalar, out_pub_x, out_pub_y. Returns 0 on success, -1 on failure.

int zig_crypto_p256_generate( uint8_t *out_scalar, uint8_t *out_pub_x, uint8_t *out_pub_y );

docs.title: zig_crypto_p256_ecdh
docs.text:
ECDH shared secret: SHA-256(x-coordinate of scalar * peer_point). Writes 32 bytes to out_shared_secret. Returns 0 on success, -1 on failure.

int zig_crypto_p256_ecdh( const uint8_t scalar[32], const uint8_t peer_x[32], const uint8_t peer_y[32], uint8_t *out_shared_secret );

docs.title: zig_crypto_ed25519_generate
docs.text:
Generate random Ed25519 key pair. Writes seed(32), public(32), signing_key(64).

void zig_crypto_ed25519_generate( uint8_t *out_seed, uint8_t *out_public, uint8_t *out_signing );

docs.title: zig_crypto_ed25519_from_seed
docs.text:
Derive Ed25519 key pair from 32-byte seed (deterministic). Writes public(32), signing_key(64). Returns 0 on success, -1 on failure.

int zig_crypto_ed25519_from_seed( const uint8_t seed[32], uint8_t *out_public, uint8_t *out_signing );

docs.title: zig_crypto_ed25519_sign
docs.text:
Sign a message with Ed25519. Writes 64-byte signature. Returns 0 on success, -1 on failure.

int zig_crypto_ed25519_sign( const uint8_t *message, size_t message_len, const uint8_t signing_key[64], uint8_t *out_signature );

docs.title: zig_crypto_ed25519_verify
docs.text:
Verify an Ed25519 signature. Returns true if valid.

bool zig_crypto_ed25519_verify( const uint8_t *message, size_t message_len, const uint8_t signature[64], const uint8_t public_key[32] );

docs.title: zig_crypto_random
docs.text:
Fill buffer with cryptographically secure random bytes. Returns true on success, false on failure.

bool zig_crypto_random(uint8_t *buf, size_t len);

docs.title: cbc128Encrypt
docs.text:
AES-128-CBC encrypt with PKCS#7 padding. Returns number of ciphertext bytes written, or error.

pub fn cbc128Encrypt( key: *const [16]u8, iv: *const [16]u8, plaintext: []const u8, out: []u8, ) !usize

docs.title: cbc128Decrypt
docs.text:
AES-128-CBC decrypt with PKCS#7 unpadding. Returns number of plaintext bytes written, or error.

pub fn cbc128Decrypt( key: *const [16]u8, iv: *const [16]u8, ciphertext: []const u8, out: []u8, ) !usize

docs.title: cbc256Encrypt
docs.text:
AES-256-CBC encrypt with PKCS#7 padding. Returns number of ciphertext bytes written, or error.

pub fn cbc256Encrypt( key: *const [32]u8, iv: *const [16]u8, plaintext: []const u8, out: []u8, ) !usize

docs.title: cbc256Decrypt
docs.text:
AES-256-CBC decrypt with PKCS#7 unpadding. Returns number of plaintext bytes written, or error.

pub fn cbc256Decrypt( key: *const [32]u8, iv: *const [16]u8, ciphertext: []const u8, out: []u8, ) !usize

docs.title: cbc256EncryptRaw
docs.text:
AES-256-CBC encrypt without padding (raw blocks). Input must be a multiple of 16 bytes. Used by CTAP2 PIN protocol (zero IV, pre-padded data).

pub fn cbc256EncryptRaw( key: *const [32]u8, iv: *const [16]u8, plaintext: []const u8, out: []u8, ) !usize

docs.title: cbc256DecryptRaw
docs.text:
AES-256-CBC decrypt without unpadding (raw blocks). Input must be a multiple of 16 bytes. Used by CTAP2 PIN protocol (zero IV, no padding).

pub fn cbc256DecryptRaw( key: *const [32]u8, iv: *const [16]u8, ciphertext: []const u8, out: []u8, ) !usize

docs.title: KeyPair (struct)
docs.text: P-256 key pair for ECDH key agreement.

docs.title: generateKeyPair
docs.text:
Generate an ephemeral P-256 ECDH key pair.

docs.title: deriveSharedSecret
docs.text:
Compute ECDH shared secret: SHA-256(x-coordinate of d * Q). This matches CTAP2 PIN protocol v2 shared secret derivation. peer_x, peer_y: affine coordinates of the peer's P-256 public key. scalar: our 32-byte scalar.

pub fn deriveSharedSecret( scalar: *const [key_length]u8, peer_x: *const [key_length]u8, peer_y: *const [key_length]u8, ) ![key_length]u8

docs.title: Static Library
docs.text:
zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast

Produces zig-out/lib/libzig_crypto.a with the C header at include/zig_crypto.h.

docs.title: With just
docs.text:
just build         # ReleaseFast static library
just test-all      # unit + PBT tests
just               # list all recipes

docs.title: With Nix
docs.text:
nix develop        # dev shell
nix build          # build package

docs.title: Running Tests
docs.text:
# Unit tests
zig build test

# Property-based tests
zig build test-pbt

docs.title: Cross-Compilation
docs.text:
All crypto primitives are pure Zig with no platform dependencies (CSPRNG uses std.crypto.random):

zig build -Dtarget=aarch64-macos
zig build -Dtarget=x86_64-linux
zig build -Dtarget=aarch64-linux

docs.title: As a Zig Dependency
docs.text:
Add to your build.zig.zon:

.dependencies = .{
    .zig_crypto = .{
        .url = "https://github.com/Jesssullivan/zig-crypto/archive/refs/heads/main.tar.gz",
    },
},

Then in build.zig:

const crypto_dep = b.dependency("zig_crypto", .{
    .target = target,
    .optimize = optimize,
});
exe.linkLibrary(crypto_dep.artifact("zig_crypto"));

docs.title: As a C Static Library
docs.text:
Build the library:

zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseFast

Link against zig-out/lib/libzig_crypto.a and include include/zig_crypto.h:

#include "zig_crypto.h"
#include <stdio.h>

int main() {
    uint8_t hash[32];
    const char *msg = "hello";
    zig_crypto_sha256((const uint8_t *)msg, 5, hash);

    uint8_t hex[64];
    zig_crypto_sha256_hex((const uint8_t *)msg, 5, hex);
    printf("SHA-256: %.64s\n", hex);
    return 0;
}

docs.title: Swift Integration
docs.text:
1. Add libzig_crypto.a and zig_crypto.h to your Xcode project
  2. Add zig_crypto.h to your bridging header
  3. Link the static library
import Foundation

var hash = [UInt8](repeating: 0, count: 32)
let data = Array("hello".utf8)
zig_crypto_sha256(data, data.count, &hash)

docs.title: Relationship to zig-ctap2
docs.text: zig-crypto provides the cryptographic primitives used by zig-ctap2 for PIN protocol v2 (ECDH P-256 key agreement, AES-256-CBC encryption, HMAC-SHA-256 authentication).
